{{CargoRelic
|name=Gene Overclocker
|class_id=20854
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Like overclocking your CPU, but with more screaming!
Shines pretty lights into your eyes
Makes ominous humming noises
Accidentally gives you lizard DNA
Warning: May cause superpowers (or super tumors)
|fame=16
|art=12
|fth=19
|civ=13
|tech=30
|ss1=prop@2490_2<br>All Gene Research SPD +0.2%<br>Gene Research Free Speedup +4m
|ss2=prop@2490_2<br>All Gene Research SPD +0.4%<br>Gene Research Free Speedup +8m
|ss3=prop@2490_2<br>All Gene Research SPD +0.6%<br>Gene Research Free Speedup +12m
|ss4=prop@2490_2<br>All Gene Research SPD +0.6%<br>Gene Research Free Speedup +12m
|ss7=prop@2490_2<br>All Gene Research SPD +0.6%<br>Gene Research Free Speedup +12m<br> (Awakened)
}}
